X-H2S COMPANION

Tutorial · Presets · SOS · Manual · Exercises

⚠️ Check the real order: your dial's slots may actually be arranged differently than shown here (e.g. C4/C5 swapped, or extra slots reassigned). Turn the dial through once, compare with Q, and note the real setup on the “My Setup” page.

What do you want to shoot?

The mode dial

C1Bold black & white

ACROS · black & white

For: Architecture, street scenes, expressive portraits, dramatic light.

Don't worry — the viewfinder image is deliberately black & white on purpose. The RAW file keeps all the colors — bring them back in-camera afterwards.

C2“Cuban” — warm analog look

CLASSIC NEG. · warm · +1 EV

For: Vacation mood, streets, cafés, golden-hour light.

Deliberately exposed +1 brighter. If a shot looks TOO bright, dial the correction back toward 0 (and remember to set it back to +1 afterwards — Auto Update keeps whatever you last dialed in).

C3Portraits & all-rounder

PRO NEG. HI · neutral

For: People, groups — and the safe default whenever you're not sure what to pick.

Natural skin tones. Nudge the focus point onto the face with the joystick.

C4Animals, birds & action

ASTIA · ~30 fps burst · pre-shot · animal/bird AF

For: Wildlife, birds in flight, kids playing, sports.

Half-press and track the subject — the camera buffers frames BEFORE you fully press the shutter. This produces a lot of photos, so keep an eye on your card. Fn1 toggles animal detection on/off; pick the subject type (animal/bird) in the Q menu.

C5Animals & action (second variant)

likely similar to C4 · animal/bird AF

For: A second action slot — often a variant of C4 (e.g. a different burst speed or shutter speed), though the factory default isn't consistent across cameras.

This camera often ships C4 and C5 with similar, complementary settings. Turn the dial to C5, press Q and check the real settings — then note them down on the “My Setup” page.

C6Slow motion (4×)

4K 100p · ETERNA

For: Water, animals in motion, sports — anything that turns magical in slow motion.

MOVIE mode only. Needs plenty of light, storage and battery — take breaks if the camera gets hot.

C7Video for motion

4K 50p · ETERNA

For: Scenes with motion; can be slowed to half speed in editing.

MOVIE mode only.

▶ VIDEOStandard video

4K 25p · ETERNA

For: Calm scenes, pans, narrative shots — the everyday cinematic look.

Slow, steady camera movement looks best.

⚠️ Important: presets remember changes!

This camera has AUTO UPDATE turned on: whatever you change in a C preset (film simulation, exposure correction, …) gets saved into the preset automatically and permanently. Turning the dial away and back resets NOTHING.

You have two options:

A — use it deliberately: know that changes stick, and reset the values you want yourself (the Q menu shows everything at a glance).

B — protected mode: turn Auto Update off, and every preset snaps back to its saved state when you switch the dial away and back:
MENU → IQ → AUTO UPDATE CUSTOM SETTING → DISABLE

A safety net either way: make a settings backup with the XApp once — see the “Connection” page.
